name: privacyquant
description: Versioned statutory knowledge graph for US state consumer privacy laws. Exposes 5 MCP tools: fetch requirements by node ID, keyword search across contract signals, multi-state compliance ceiling synthesis, DPA clause checking with GREEN/YELLOW/RED verdicts and redline suggestions, and DSAR routing by consumer state. Covers CCPA/CPRA, VCDPA, CPA, CTDPA, UCPA, TDPSA, OCPA, MCDPA, ICDPA, INCDPA, TIPA, DPDPA, NJDPA, NHDPA, NDPA, KCDPA, MODPA, MCDPA-MN, RIDTPPA, and FDBR across 135+ atomic requirement nodes.
